case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORPORATION vs. DIN, ZAHIR UD et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIN, ZAHIR UD TAHIRA, MUSHARAF POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: [SEE BELOW TEXT FOR COMPLETE DESCRIPTION OF ITEMS], OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $1,426.60, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.00, ITEMS TO BE RECOVERED ARE: GEMSTONE AND BRACELET, ELGIN DIAMOND AND LADIES CITIZEN WATCH, TABLE, CHAIRS, AND CHINA CABINET.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORPORATION
